subcodes.first_line: The missive hath been dispatched and hath attained unto the Most Holy Court, and from the horizon of loving-kindness there hath shone forth the Sun of Mercy. He - and His word is the truth - hath said: "We have made mention of the name of 'Ayn." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارسلت المکتوب و تشرف بالساحة الاقدس و اشرقت فی افق العنایة شمس الرحمة قال و قوله الحق انا ذکرنا اسم العین
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @wisdom [hikmat], @transcendence; unknowability of God
